name: OpenMythos
description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.

name: design-extract
description: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+.

name: open-codesign
description: Open-source AI design tool — prompt to interactive prototype, slide deck, PDF & marketing assets. Multi-model (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama), BYOK, local-first. The open counterpart to Claude Design.

name: WorldSeed
description: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously — physical rules, information asymmetry, any agent can plug in. Define scenarios in YAML, watch stories emerge.

name: open-carrusel
description: AI-powered Instagram carousel builder. Chat with Claude to design slides; export as PNGs at exact Instagram dimensions. Type /start in Claude Code to bootstrap.

name: agent-startup-kit
description: Reusable AI coding workflows for Claude Code and VS Code to ship auth, billing, and landing pages faster.

name: alice
description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit

name: hi-kid
description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. An desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.

name: cavemem
description: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants. Stored compressed. Retrieved fast. Local by default.

name: ennoia
description: Declarative Document Indexing (DDI) framework for Python. Define schemas, extract structured indices, search smarter.
